zh.lifeSummary: Adam Hepburn 2nd Earl of Bothwell, Lord Hailes是Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell和Margaret Gordon的兒子，於1482年3月17日出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾波維爾。他於1511年8月28日與Agnes Stewart在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安霍利盧德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1513年登記服兵役。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德吉可紐頓享年31歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adam Hepburn 2nd Earl of Bothwell, Lord Hailes是Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell和Margaret Gordon的儿子，于1482年3月17日出生在苏格兰藍納可爾波維爾。他于1511年8月28日与Agnes Stewart在苏格兰米德洛迪安霍利盧德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1513年登记服兵役。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德吉可紐頓享年31岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Hepburn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Durham) and Scottish: habitational name from Hepburn in Chillingham (Northumberland), Hebron (Northumberland), or Hebburn in Jarrow (Durham). The placenames probably all derive from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. Compare Hebron .

variants.name: Eborn
meanings: English (Middlesex, Buckinghamshire, and Oxfordshire): variant of Eburne, itself a possible variant of Hepburn . However, the placename Hepburn comes from northeastern England, and the H- spellings are a late development, which reinforces the suspicion that the name may have a different but unknown derivation.

variants.name: Hebron
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Hebron (Northumberland), possibly from Old English hēah ‘high’ + byrgen ‘burial place, tumulus’. See also Hepburn .
Czech: from the Biblical placename (II Samuel 2: 1-3), said to mean ‘alliance’ in Hebrew.

variants.name: Heyburn
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, probably in southern England, named with an unknown first element + Old English burna ‘spring, stream’.
Irish (Ulster): possibly a variant of Scottish   Hepburn  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Adam Hepburn 2nd Earl of Bothwell, Lord Hailes was born on 17 March 1482, in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland as the son of Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell and Margaret Gordon. He married Agnes Stewart on 28 August 1511, in Holyrood, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1513. He died on 9 September 1513, in Kirknewton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Adam Hepburn 2nd Earl of Bothwell, Lord Hailes est né le 17 mars 1482, à Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Écosse, fils de Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell et Margaret Gordon. Il a épousé Agnes Stewart le 28 août 1511, à Holyrood, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1513. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Kirknewton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Adam Hepburn 2nd Earl of Bothwell, Lord Hailes wurde am 17. März 1482 in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, als Sohn von Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell und Margaret Gordon geboren. Er hat am 28. August 1511 in Holyrood, Midlothian, Scotland Agnes Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1513 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Kirknewton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Adam Hepburn 2nd Earl of Bothwell, Lord Hailes è nato il il 17 marzo 1482 nel Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland come figlio di Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell e Margaret Gordon. Lui sposato Agnes Stewart il 28 agosto 1511, nel Holyrood, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1513. Morì il 9 settembre 1513, nel Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Hepburn 2nd Earl of Bothwell, Lord Hailesは1482年3月17日にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアボスウエルでPatrick Hepburn 1st Earl of BothwellとMargaret Gordonの息子として生まれた。1511年8月28日にスコットランドミドロスアンホーリルーッドでAgnes Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年に兵役登録をした。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドキルクニュートンで31歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Hepburn 2nd Earl of Bothwell, Lord Hailes(은)는 1482년 3월 17일 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 벗h웰에서 Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell(와)과 Margaret Gordon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1511년 8월 28일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 홀이루드에서 Agnes Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 커뉴턴에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.17 March 1482–9 September 1513: 17 de março de 1482–9 de setembro de 1513
pt.lifeSummary: Adam Hepburn 2nd Earl of Bothwell, Lord Hailes nasceu em 17 de março de 1482, em Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland filho de Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell e Margaret Gordon. Ele casou-se com Agnes Stewart em 28 de agosto de 1511, em Holyrood, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1513. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Adam Hepburn 2nd Earl of Bothwell, Lord Hailes родился 17 марта 1482 г. в местности ботвелл, ланаркшир, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell и Margaret Gordon. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Stewart 28 августа 1511 г. в местности холируд, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1513 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности кирнютон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.17 March 1482–9 September 1513: 17 de marzo de 1482–9 de septiembre de 1513
es.lifeSummary: Adam Hepburn 2nd Earl of Bothwell, Lord Hailes nació el 17 de marzo de 1482, en Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland como hijo de Patrick Hepburn 1st Earl of Bothwell y Margaret Gordon. Se casó con Agnes Stewart el 28 de agosto de 1511, en Holyrood, Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1513. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Kirknewton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
